name: Genomic DNA Extraction (Cells/Tissue)
nameCn: 基因组 DNA 提取（细胞/组织）

components.name: 1. 裂解：加 Lysis Buffer + Proteinase K
components.note: 56°C 孵育 1–3 h 或过夜; 组织需剪碎

components.name: 2. RNase A 处理 (可选, 37°C 30 min)
3. 蛋白沉淀 (加 Protein Precipitation Sol)
components.note: 涡旋 20 s → 冰上 5 min → 离心 16,000×g 3 min

components.name: 4. 异丙醇沉淀 DNA
components.note: 加等体积异丙醇到上清, 轻柔翻转

components.name: 7. 风干 5–15 min → 溶解于 TE
components.note: 室温或 65°C 孵育助溶解; 勿涡旋以避免剪切

notes.en: Phenol-chloroform method: replace step 3 with equal volume phenol:chloroform:IAA (25:24:1) extraction → chloroform:IAA extraction → ethanol precipitation. Use wide-bore tips for high-MW gDNA to avoid shearing. Blood samples: lyse RBCs first. FFPE tissue: deparaffinize first. Column extraction (DNeasy) is faster but yields lower MW DNA.
notes.zh: 酚氯仿提取法：步骤 3 换为等体积 phenol:chloroform:IAA (25:24:1) 提取 → 再用 chloroform:IAA 提取 → 乙醇沉淀。高分子量 gDNA 用宽口枪头操作，避免剪切。血液样品需先裂解红细胞。FFPE 组织需去石蜡。柱提取法 (DNeasy) 更快但产量和分子量较低。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; QIAGEN DNeasy Blood & Tissue Handbook
